title: liquidqc fragmentomics output (v1.0.0)
description: Per-sample JSON envelope emitted by `liquidqc rna`. Always-present envelope fields are required; the four Phase 2 fragmentomics blocks (fragment_length, end_motifs, soft_clips, periodicity), the Phase 3 `per_gene` reference block, and the Phase 4 Tier-3 add-ons (`adapter_readthrough_rate`, `splice_site_dinucleotides`, `per_chromosome`, `gene_class_fractions`, `panels`, `sex_inference`, `snp_fingerprint`, `saturation`, `cycle_quality`) are optional and follow the schemas defined here. Companion sparse Parquet (`<sample_id>.per_gene.parquet`) holds Tier-2 per-gene rows; the `per_gene` block in this envelope locates and validates it.

schema_version.description: Semver for this schema. v1.0.0 is the first stable release. See CHANGELOG.md for per-version notes.

git_commit.description: Short git hash of the liquidqc build (or `unknown` for non-git builds).

sample_id.description: Sample identifier. Defaults to BAM basename without extension; overridable via `--sample-id`.

bam_path.description: Absolute path to the input BAM as supplied at run time.

bam_md5.description: MD5 of the BAM file bytes.

bam_size_bytes.description: Size of the BAM file in bytes.

gtf_path.description: Absolute path to the GTF annotation as supplied at run time.

reference_fasta_md5.description: MD5 of the reference FASTA. Null if `--fasta` was not supplied (end-motif fragmentomics unavailable).

library_prep.description: Free-text library prep label from `--library-prep`. Never silently defaulted; missing value is a hard error at the CLI layer. Used downstream to stratify cross-cohort analyses and to auto-flag tagmentation-driven end-motif bias.

paired_end.description: True if the BAM contains paired-end reads (auto-detected unless overridden via `--paired-end true|false`).

read_length_max.description: Maximum observed read length in this BAM.

read_length_mean.description: Mean observed read length in this BAM.

read_count_total.description: Total number of read records in the BAM (primary + secondary + supplementary + unmapped).

read_count_after_filters.description: Read count after `filters` (MAPQ, primary-only, proper-pair where requested) is applied.

filters.description: Filter parameters actually applied to this run. Keys are stable across schema versions; new keys may be added.

require_proper_pair.description: If true, only proper-pair reads (SAM flag 0x2) are counted toward QC and fragmentomics.

drop_secondary.description: If true, secondary alignments (SAM flag 0x100) are excluded.

drop_supplementary.description: If true, supplementary alignments (SAM flag 0x800) are excluded.

drop_duplicates.description: If true, reads flagged as duplicate (SAM flag 0x400) are excluded. cfRNA defaults to false because biological duplication is ~80%.

qc_flags.description: Auto-generated QC flags. The flag set evolves with the schema; current names are documented inline. Unknown values may appear in future schema versions.

runtime_seconds.description: Wall-clock seconds for the full liquidqc run on this BAM.

peak_rss_mb.description: Peak resident set size in MiB observed during the run.

fragment_length.description: Phase 2 Tier 1: fragment-length distribution from |TLEN| of proper pairs (one observation per pair). Absent on single-end input.

bins.description: Fragment-length histogram in eight named bins. Counts are integer pair observations.

frac_lt_80.description: Fraction of pairs with |TLEN| < 80 nt (matches the lt_50 + 50_80 bin sum / total).

frac_ge_300.description: Fraction of pairs with |TLEN| >= 300 nt. Equals (bins.300_500 + bins.gt_500) / total_pairs_observed.

mean.description: Mean |TLEN| in nt across observed pairs.

median.description: Median |TLEN| in nt across observed pairs.

total_pairs_observed.description: Number of proper pairs contributing to the histogram.

end_motifs.description: Phase 2 Tier 1: 5' and 3' fragment-end 4-mers from the reference FASTA (cleavage motifs). Absent if `--fasta` was not supplied (qc_flag `end_motifs_skipped_no_fasta` is emitted) or on single-end input. 5' motif: 4 ref bases starting at the leftmost coordinate of a proper pair, in fragment-strand orientation. 3' motif: 4 ref bases ending at the rightmost coordinate, reverse-complemented to fragment-strand orientation. Pairs where any of the eight bases is non-ACGT are dropped.

kmer_5p.description: 5'-end 4-mer counts. 256 keys (AAAA..TTTT). Values are integer pair counts.

kmer_3p.description: 3'-end 4-mer counts (in fragment-strand orientation, reverse-complemented from the reference). 256 keys.

shannon_entropy_5p.description: Shannon entropy (base 2) of the 5' 4-mer distribution. Max log2(256) = 8.

jensen_shannon_divergence_5p_vs_3p.description: Jensen-Shannon divergence (base 2) between 5' and 3' 4-mer distributions. 0 = identical, 1 = maximally different.

soft_clips.description: Phase 2 Tier 1: soft-clip 4-mers from read sequences (not reference). Counts split by clip end (5' vs 3' of the fragment) and by clip-length bin (1 nt, 2 nt, 3+ nt). 5'-clip / 3'-clip end semantics are orientation-corrected against the read strand. Per-end clip rates are over primary mapped reads.

kmer_5p_by_clip_len.description: 5'-clip 4-mer counts per clip-length bin (`len_1`, `len_2`, `len_3plus`). Values are 256-key 4-mer histograms.

periodicity.description: Phase 2 Tier 1: FFT-based periodicity of the |TLEN| histogram restricted to 50-500 nt (length 451, zero-padded to 512 for the transform). Power values are normalized to total_power (so they form fractions in [0, 1]) — multiply by total_power for raw spectral magnitudes. Absent on single-end input.

per_gene.description: Phase 3 Tier 2: reference to the sibling per-gene sparse Parquet (`<sample_id>.per_gene.parquet`) that holds Tier-2 fragmentomics per gene with >= `min_gene_reads_threshold` primary reads. The Parquet itself stores sample-id in file-level KV metadata (not as a column) so cross-sample tables stack cleanly.

parquet_path.description: Filename of the per-gene Parquet sibling, located in the same directory as this JSON envelope.

parquet_md5.description: MD5 hex digest of the Parquet file bytes.

n_genes_total.description: Total number of genes considered (size of the GTF gene set).

n_genes_emitted.description: Number of genes that met `min_gene_reads_threshold` and therefore appear as rows in the Parquet table.

min_gene_reads_threshold.description: Minimum per-gene primary read count required for a gene to appear as a Parquet row. Mirrors the `--min-gene-reads` CLI value.

schema_version_per_gene.description: Semver of the per-gene Parquet table schema (independent of the envelope `schema_version`).

columns.description: Column names of the Parquet table in declaration order.

adapter_readthrough_rate.description: Phase 4 Tier 3: fraction of leftmost proper-pair mates with `|TLEN| < leftmost_qlen` — the read length exceeds the fragment so each read extends past the opposite fragment end into adapter sequence. Pre-trimmed libraries report low rates because adapter-contaminated bases are clipped before alignment. Absent on single-end input.

splice_site_dinucleotides.description: Phase 4 Tier 3: tally of donor/acceptor 2 nt pairs over the unique splice junctions discovered by junction_annotation. Counts are over distinct junctions, not splicing events, so depth bias does not dominate. Both reference-strand orientations are folded into each class (e.g. `gt_ag` includes (GT, AG) on the (+) strand and (CT, AC) reverse-complemented from the (-) strand). Requires `--fasta`; absent otherwise.

other.description: Any other ACGT pair (incl. non-ACGT bases).

skipped_oob.description: Junctions skipped because the donor/acceptor 2 nt fell off the contig or the contig is missing from the FASTA.

junctions_total.description: Total unique junctions considered (sum of the four classes plus `skipped_oob`).

per_chromosome.description: Phase 4 Tier 3: per-contig read counts and proper-pair |TLEN| mean. Surfaces the chrM (necrosis proxy), chrY (sex / chimerism), and contig-level CNV biases that are otherwise implicit in idxstats and inner_distance.

total_mapped.description: Total mapped reads across all contigs that received at least one record. Used as the denominator for `contigs.<name>.read_fraction`.

contigs.description: Map keyed by BAM-header contig name. Contigs with no records are dropped (sparse).

proper_pair_insert_size_mean.description: Mean |insert_size| over leftmost-mate proper pairs on this contig. 0.0 when proper_pair_count == 0.

cycle_quality.description: Phase 4 Tier 3: per-cycle base-quality drop-off, separately for read 1 and read 2. Cycles are sequencing-order (cycle 0 = first base off the sequencer). Long reads contribute only their first `max_cycles_tracked` bases.

read1_mean_quality.description: Mean Phred quality at each sequencing cycle for read 1 (or single-end). Truncated to the longest observed cycle.

read2_mean_quality.description: Mean Phred quality at each sequencing cycle for read 2. Absent on single-end input.

max_cycles_tracked.description: Cap on cycles tracked. Reads longer than this contribute only their first `max_cycles_tracked` bases.

gene_class_fractions.description: Phase 4 Tier 3: bundled HGNC gene-class read fractions. Each class is computed by summing `featureCounts -g gene_id` per-gene reads across genes whose `gene_name` GTF attribute matches a bundled symbol. Denominator = `featurecounts.assigned`. Classes: hemoglobin (HBA/HBB/HBG/HBM/HBQ/HBZ subunits — RBC lysis QC + erythroid signal), ribosomal_protein (RPS/RPL/MRPS/MRPL families — proliferative / stressed cells), apolipoprotein (APOA*/APOB/APOC*/APOD/APOE/APOF/APOH/APOL*/APOM/APOO* — liver-derived cargo).

denominator.description: Total reads used as the denominator for `fraction` fields (typically `featurecounts.assigned`).

panels.description: Phase 4 Tier 3: marker-panel read aggregation. For each loaded panel (default = bundled `lm22` + `tabula_sapiens_cfrna` + `vorperian`; user-extensible via `--panels-tsv`), reports per-cell-type read totals and fractions of `denominator` (typically `featurecounts.assigned`). Bundled panels are partial curations — see source-file headers for citations and call out replacement strategies in the README.

loaded_entries.description: Total panel TSV rows loaded across all selected sources.

matched_entries.description: Subset of loaded rows whose gene_id / gene_symbol resolved against the GTF.

panels.description: Map keyed by panel name. Each panel maps cell-type → (reads, fraction).

saturation.description: Phase 4 Tier 3: gene-detection saturation curve via deterministic per-read hash bucketing (crc32(qname) % 100). Each unambiguously assigned (`featureCounts -g gene_id` Assigned) read lands in one bucket; per-(gene, bucket) counts are accumulated. At each requested `fraction`, the corresponding bucket cutoff is taken and we report `genes_detected` (≥1 read) and `genes_detected_min10` (≥10 reads).

snp_fingerprint.description: Phase 4 Tier 3: per-site allele depth + ALT fraction at common-SNP positions. Default panel is the bundled 12-site GRCh38 smoke list (NOT suitable for cohort-scale concordance); pass `--snp-panel <TSV>` (chrom<TAB>pos<TAB>ref<TAB>alt[<TAB>rsid]) to use a real ~17.5k-site panel. Skipped silently when no sites resolve to BAM-header contigs.

sites_total.description: Sites whose contig resolved against the BAM header.

sites.description: Per-site rows in panel order (per-tid then by pos).

sex_inference.description: Phase 4 Tier 3: sex inference from chrY:autosome read ratio + XIST + RPS4Y1 expression. Always emitted; never compared against user-supplied metadata (the v1 contract is `--bam` only). Downstream consumers can compare `predicted_sex` against their own subject metadata; the schema deliberately does not include a `sex_swap_warning` qc_flag.

xist_reads.description: Sum of `featureCounts -g gene_id` reads across genes whose `gene_name` is XIST.

denominator.description: Total reads used for the `*_fraction` fields (typically `featurecounts.assigned`).

predicted_sex.description: Predicted from chrY:autosome ratio + XIST. `ambiguous` when both signals are strong; `unknown` at low depth or when neither signal is strong enough to call.

bundled_symbols.description: Number of HGNC symbols in the bundled list for this class.

matched_genes.description: Number of GTF genes that resolved to a bundled symbol (matched on `gene_name`). Zero typically means the GTF lacked the `gene_name` attribute.

reads.description: Sum of `featureCounts` per-read counts across the matched genes.
